calendar.matters:
Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 1094.5
Off Calendar Aug-19-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CHRISTOPHER C. DEHNER, Esq. of Jones Clifford, LLP (Tel: 415-431-5310) for petitioner Scott E. Edwards;
Atty. REBECCA LIU, Esq. of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3870) for respondent Retirement Board of the City and County of San Francisco Retirement System.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER SCOTT EDWARDS's Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 1094.5.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

***** After the hearing, the court signs an order denying the petition for writ of mandate. (See the signed order for the complete ruling.) (302/EPS) *****

Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 1094.5
Off Calendar Aug-11-2021 Continued To Aug-19-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER SCOTT EDWARDS' Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 1094.5 is Continued to August 19, 2021 on the Court's own motion.
